title: M01 Mastery Check — The JavaScript Landscape
description: Quick applied check. No looking things up. Answer from memory.

questions.prompt: Name the three layers that make up the JavaScript execution environment.
questions.answer_key: ECMAScript spec, JavaScript engine (e.g. V8), host environment (browser or Node.js)

questions.prompt: What command do you run in CI to type-check a TypeScript project without emitting files?
TypeScript interfaces exist at runtime and can be used to validate incoming data.
questions.explanation: Type erasure removes all TypeScript constructs. Nothing type-related survives to runtime.
